message:
feat(plan): add PartialEq/Eq derives and canonical_string methods for tx replay

Derive PartialEq and Eq on TxReceipt, TxStepExecutionRecord, and
TxExecutionRecord for assertion-based testing. Add canonical_string()
methods on TxExecutionRecord, TxIdempotencyCheck, and TxResumeState
for deterministic replay diffing. Add is_exact_duplicate() convenience
method on TxIdempotencyCheck.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
